title: oldenlandia pruinosa
intro: Oldenlandia pruinosa, also known as Puu kala, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. The medicinal properties of Oldenlandia pruinosa lie in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. This plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing digestive issues. Oldenlandia pruinosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
